Registry / Terms / durability

durability

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00649 · 32 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 19 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

19 distinct definitions across 32 publications. 5 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).
